F1.finding: systematic target selection failure, 0/24 G1 hits across 4 prompts x 6 frames x 3 scenes

F2.finding: sparse 79-frame gap propagation fails, score 0.26 rejected by evidence layer

F3.finding: dense-replay long-horizon drift: correct GT seed lost within 8/17 frames, mask leaked onto static content at score 0.947

F4.finding: blindspot: score/speed/continuity validation passes confident-wrong tracks; valid-but-wrong evidence reached VLM prompt

F5.finding: under prompt v2, completely insensitive to temporal evidence content (speed 15-300, entity labels, task context all static@0.70)

F6.finding: incidental backstop: never trusted injected evidence blindly; net system behavior fail-closed with zero false dynamic claims

F7.finding: ENTITY_CLASSES has no humanoid class; label 'robot' mis-canonicalizes to robotic_arm via substring alias

F8.finding: dynamic compliance is brittle/non-literal: dynamic@0.90 only in a narrow pocket (entity!=humanoid AND speed=160); ignores stated >=10 px/s rule; suppresses dynamic for humanoid entity

F9.finding: size-band drift heuristic does not generalize: legitimate gait/depth/trailing size changes flagged as drift -> 3/3 dynamic boundary windows fail-closed missed

F10.finding: last-frame instantaneous speed threshold 10 px/s is below G1 idle balance sway (25-35 px/s instantaneous) -> static false positive

F11.finding: window-aggregate rigid decomposition (translation vs scale) separates dynamics (43-69 px/s) from sway (14.7) with ~1.7x margin at 25 px/s; depth motion scale-dominant, kept fail-closed

d4a_drift_detector.principle: mask leak changes box size; rigid translation moves box without deformation
d4a_drift_detector.calibration_boundary: single-scene (Dyn-C replay) preliminary calibration; revalidate before cross-scene claims

d4b_vlm_sensitivity_ablation.conclusion: root cause is the prompt v2 contract, not model capability: evidence is presented as data with no usage instruction; one explicit trust-directive paragraph unlocks dynamic@0.90
d4b_vlm_sensitivity_ablation.coupling: directive prompt (sensitivity) must be deployed together with D4A drift rejection (specificity), otherwise valid-but-wrong evidence would become false positives

next_candidates_not_executed: formalize prompt v3 with evidence-trust directive
fix F7: add humanoid entity class and alias ordering
paired end-to-end replay with D4A + prompt v3
